ARM.summary: Advanced Micro Devices  has soared over the past year amid excitement over its central-processing units.  AMD shares were up 1.6% at $526.07 in Thursday’s premarket, adding to a 259% gain over the past 12 months through to Wednesday’s close.  “AMD’s 146% surge since April, versus 58% for the SOX [PHLX Semiconductor Index], has left the shares priced at a premium to peers with little room for error,” Naji wrote.

ARM.headline: Arm Announces Earnings Release Date for First Quarter Fiscal Year Ended 2027
ARM.summary: CAMBRIDGE, England, July 08, 2026--Arm Holdings plc (NASDAQ: ARM) will report financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2027 on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call via audio webcast at 14:00 Pacific Time (17:00 Eastern Time / 22:00 British Summer Time) to review its financial results and business outlook.
